title: React File Dropzone Uploader

statement.markdown:
## React File Dropzone Uploader Component

Build a fully interactive Drag and Drop File Uploader dropzone in React with upload progress simulation.

### Requirements:
1. **Drag-and-Drop Area**: Styled wrapper area indicating active borders (highlight) on file drag over.
2. **File Validation**: Validate that dropped/selected files do not exceed 5MB and match specific image/PDF mime types.
3. **Simulated Progress**: Adding a file triggers a mock upload progress bar simulating increments from 0% to 100% over 2 seconds.
4. **Remove Files**: List all uploaded files with dynamic status sizes and a trash can delete icon to remove them.

constraints: Must support mobile responsive layout coordinates

gradingCriteria.description: Verify that the interactive props, callbacks, and element structures work cleanly.
Verify state structure designs and clean Tailwind CSS layouts.
